{{Quote|My son, Beju. The last in line of the great Tallah dynasty — a fact he does not let you forget for a moment. All his life he has wanted to rule Gala. He has not forgiven me for calling elections.|Veda|<ref name="Mark of Crown" />}}
[[Prince/Legends|Prince]] '''Beju''' was the prince of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Gala]] and the son of [[Queen/Legends|Queen]] [[Veda (Galacian)|Veda]] and the late [[King/Legends|King]] [[Cana]]. Initially, he secretly sided with the [[Syndicat]], who offered to help Beju take over Gala in exchange for power. Beju planned on thwarting his planet's [[Galacian Gubernatorial election, 44 BBY|elections]] by cutting off the [[Bacta/Legends|bacta]] supply and reinstate it when the people started suffering, which would make the Prince look like a hero and make the other two candidates for the elections look inferior. However, his plan backfired when [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]] and [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] exposed the plot. Kenobi disguised himself as the Prince due to their apparent similar looks–both being adolescent boys of similar height. Obi-Wan acted like the arrogant Prince to help the ploy, which made thwarting Beju and the Syndicat's nefarious plan much easier.

Fortunately for Beju, Queen Veda did not know about his transactions, so he was able to proceed with the elections. When everyone found out that Veda had been poisoned, Beju arranged for her to be locked up for protection. He had a brief [[Sword/Legends|sword]] [[Duel on Gala|duel]] with Obi-Wan Kenobi and managed to wound him, but was no match for the Padawan's [[The Force/Legends|Force]]-powered reflexes. The fight was brought to a halt by [[Viso]], Veda's blind supporter. Beju was then tested by the Mark of the Crown, which would determine if he was the rightful heir. The results turned out negative, to Beju's dismay, showing that [[Elan Tallah|Elan]], his half-sister, was in fact the true heir. However, after being coaxed by Kenobi, he honorably dropped out of the election and turned his attention to arresting leading [[Council Minister]] [[Lonnag Giba]] for the attempted murder of Veda.

Later, Beju backed the remaining candidate [[Wila Prammi]] and met Elan for the first time. Both siblings were reconciled.
